title: gonolobus decipiens
intro: Gonolobus decipiens, also known as the "False Trumpet Vine," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Central and South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus decipiens include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antivenom to treat snake bites. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin conditions.
